title: CEBARACETAM
description: Cebaracetam is a synthetic nootropic and a substituted phenyl-derivative of the racetam family, specifically featuring a piperazinone ring. It is being studied for its potential to improve cognitive impairment, particularly in the context of neurodegenerative conditions or brain injury, likely through the modulation of glutamatergic receptors.

research.title: Efficacy and safety of L-oxiracetam on cognitive function in patients with traumatic brain injury: a multicentre, randomised, double-blind, phase 3 clinical trial
research.summary: This study demonstrates that members of the racetam family, like oxiracetam, significantly improve cognitive scores and neurological function in patients recovering from traumatic brain injuries.

sentiment.summary: There is a significant lack of direct user discussion regarding Cebaracetam specifically, as most users focus on related racetams or general cognitive enhancers like creatine.

effects.label: Clinical Status:
effects.description: While related compounds like oxiracetam show efficacy in Phase 3 trials, Cebaracetam remains less established in mainstream clinical use

effects.label: Limited Evidence:
effects.description: Most available data is based on chemical structure similarities to known nootropics rather than large-scale human trials

effects.label: Specific Targets:
effects.description: Appears most effective for cognitive deficits rather than healthy performance enhancement

dosage.label: Standard Range:
dosage.description: Typical of the racetam class, clinical studies often investigate doses between 400mg and 800mg

dosage.label: Frequency:
dosage.description: Usually administered 2-3 times daily due to the metabolic half-life of similar compounds

dosage.label: Trial Protocols:
dosage.description: In high-potency research contexts, doses are strictly controlled based on body weight

sideEffects.label: Headaches:
sideEffects.description: Frequently reported with racetams, often mitigated by choline supplementation

sideEffects.label: Insomnia:
sideEffects.description: Potential for sleep disruption if taken too late in the day due to stimulatory effects

sideEffects.label: Gastrointestinal Distress:
sideEffects.description: Minor nausea or stomach upset is possible upon initial administration

availability.label: Research Chemical:
availability.description: Often found through specialized nootropic vendors rather than standard supplement stores

availability.label: Legal Status:
availability.description: Generally unregulated in many jurisdictions but not approved by the FDA for medical use
